name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES state, flag, turn

(* State of each process: idle, trying, critical *)
State == {"idle", "trying", "critical"}

(* Initial state: all processes idle, no flags set, turn arbitrary *)
Init == /\ state \in [1..N -> State]
        /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
        /\ turn \in 1..N
        /\ \A i \in 1..N: state[i] = "idle" /\ flag[i] = FALSE

(* Next-state relation: process i can move from idle to trying, from trying to critical if turn = i, from critical to idle *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N:
          \/ /\ state[i] = "idle"
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
             /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
             /\ turn' = turn
          \/ /\ state[i] = "trying"
             /\ turn = i
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
             /\ flag' = flag
             /\ turn' = turn
          \/ /\ state[i] = "critical"
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]
             /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
             /\ turn' = turn

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, flag, turn>>

(* Mutual exclusion: no two processes in critical section simultaneously *)
TypeOK == \A i, j \in 1..N: i # j => ~(state[i] = "critical" /\ state[j] = "critical")

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommitProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Participants, Coordinator
VARIABLES coordinator, participants


vars == << participants, coordinator >>

Init == /\ participants = [p \in Participants |-> [state |-> "Init", vote |-> "None"]]
       /\ coordinator = [state |-> "Init", decision |-> "None"]

Prepare == /\ coordinator.state = "Init"
          /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "Prepare"]
          /\ UNCHANGED participants

VoteYes == /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "Prepare"
          /\ coordinator.state = "Prepare"
             /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "VoteYes"]
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p] = [participants[p] EXCEPT !.vote = "Yes"]
             /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT !.state = "VoteYes"]
          /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

VoteNo == /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p].state = "Prepare"
          /\ coordinator.state = "Prepare"
             /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "VoteNo"]
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p] = [participants[p] EXCEPT !.vote = "No"]
             /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT !.state = "VoteNo"]
          /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

Commit == /\ coordinator.state = "VoteYes"
          /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "Commit"]
             /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.decision = "Commit"]
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p] = [participants[p] EXCEPT !.state = "Commit"]
             /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT !.state = "Commit"]
          /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

Abort == /\ coordinator.state = "VoteNo"
          /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.state = "Abort"]
             /\ coordinator' = [coordinator EXCEPT !.decision = "Abort"]
          /\ \A p \in Participants: participants[p] = [participants[p] EXCEPT !.state = "Abort"]
             /\ participants' = [participants EXCEPT !.state = "Abort"]
          /\ UNCHANGED coordinator

Next == Prepare \/ VoteYes \/ VoteNo \/ Commit \/ Abort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ participants \in [Participants -> [state : {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, vote : {"None", "Yes", "No"}]]
          /\ coordinator \in [state : {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, decision : {"None", "Commit", "Abort"}]
          /\ vars \in [participants : [Participants -> [state : {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, vote : {"None", "Yes", "No"}]], coordinator : [state : {"Init", "Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, decision : {"None", "Commit", "Abort"}]]

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

\* State of each philosopher: "thinking", "hungry", or "eating"
VARIABLES philosophers, forks

Init == /\ philosophers = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]
        /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> TRUE]  \* TRUE means fork i is free

\* Helper predicates
LeftFork(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

\* Philosopher i can start eating if both adjacent forks are free
CanEat(i) == philosophers[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] /\ forks[RightFork(i)]

\* Action: philosopher i picks up both forks and starts eating
TakeForks(i) == /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = FALSE, ![RightFork(i)] = FALSE]
                /\ UNCHANGED <<philosophers, forks>>

\* Action: philosopher i puts down both forks and starts thinking
PutForks(i) == /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = TRUE, ![RightFork(i)] = TRUE]
                /\ UNCHANGED <<philosophers, forks>>

\* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry
BecomeHungry(i) == /\ philosophers' = [philosophers EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                  /\ UNCHANGED <<philosophers, forks>>

\* Next-state relation
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          (CanEat(i) /\ TakeForks(i)) \/ PutForks(i) \/ BecomeHungry(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<philosophers, forks>>

\* Type invariant
TypeOK == /\ philosophers \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ forks \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

\* Safety properties
NoDeadlock == []~[](\E i \in 1..N : philosophers[i] = "hungry" /\ forks[LeftFork(i)] /\ forks[RightFork(i)])
NoStarvation == []~[](\E i \in 1..N : philosophers[i] = "eating")

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
VARIABLES flag, num


vars == <<num, flag>>

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag[i] = FALSE
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num)]
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
          /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q[tail] = 0
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q[head] = 1
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ size' = size - 1

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, majority, NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state, candidate, doesn, hasn

(* State can be "Follower", "Candidate", or "Leader" *)

Init == 
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = [s \in 1..N |-> NULL]
    /\ state = [s \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

(* A candidate requests votes from all servers *)
RequestVote == 
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : state[s] = "Follower"
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : currentTerm = 0
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : votedFor[s] = NULL
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : state[s] = "Candidate"

(* A server grants a vote if it hasn't voted yet and the candidate's term is at least as large *)
GrantVote == 
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : state[s] = "Follower"
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : currentTerm = 0
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : votedFor[s] = NULL
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : state[s] = "Candidate"
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : currentTerm' = 1
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]

(* A server becomes a candidate if it doesn't receive a majority of votes *)
NoMajority == 
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : state[s] = "Follower"
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : currentTerm = 0
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : votedFor[s] = NULL
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : state[s] = "Candidate"
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : currentTerm' = 1
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
    /\ \A s \in 1..N : state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Follower"]

Next == 
    \/ RequestVote
    \/ GrantVote
    \/ NoMajority

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == 
  /\ readers = <<>> 
  /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == 
  /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) :
        /\ readers[r] = TRUE
        /\ readers' = Replace(readers, r, FALSE)
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) :
        /\ readers[r] = FALSE
        /\ readers' = Replace(readers, r, TRUE)
        /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  \/ writer_active = FALSE
     /\ \E r \in 1..Len(readers) : readers[r] = FALSE
     /\ writer_active' = TRUE
     /\ readers' = readers

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DistributedSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N, Channels, InitState, InitChannelState
VARIABLES channelState, state


vars == <<state, channelState>>

Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> InitState[p]]
        /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> InitChannelState[c]]

Next == /\ \E p \in 1..N :
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = NextState(state[p])]
          /\ channelState' = channelState
        \/ \E c \in Channels :
          /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![c] = NextChannelState(channelState[c])]
          /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> InitState[1..N]]
          /\ channelState \in [Channels -> InitChannelState[Channels]]
====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Msg
VARIABLES messages, token


vars == <<token, messages>>

Init == /\ token = 1
        /\ messages = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]

Next == /\ token' = %(token, N) + 1
        /\ messages' = [messages EXCEPT ![token] = messages[token] \cup {Msg}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == /\ token \in 1..N
          /\ messages \in [1..N -> SUBSET {Msg}]

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL
VARIABLES store


vars == <<store>>

Init == 
  /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == 
  \/ /\ action = "Put"
     /\ key \in Keys
     /\ value \in Values
     /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![key] = value]
  \/ /\ action = "Get"
     /\ key \in Keys
     /\ store' = store

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ store \in [Keys -> Values \cup {NULL}]

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N, M, V, Ballot, Value

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen

vars == <<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

Init == 
  /\ acceptors = [i \in 1..N |-> [maxBallot -> 0, promisedBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
  /\ proposers = [i \in 1..M |-> [maxBallot -> 0, chosenBallot -> 0, chosenValue -> NULL]]
  /\ chosen = <<>> 

Prepare(p, b) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [promisedBallot -> b]]
  /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> IF i = p THEN proposers[i] ELSE proposers[i]]
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Promise(p, b) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = [i \in 1..M |-> IF i = p THEN 
        LET maxBallot == Max(acceptors.balBallot) 
            chosenBallot = acceptors.chosenBallot 
            chosenValue = acceptors.chosenValue 
        IN proposers[i] \cup [chosenBallot -> chosenBallot, chosenValue -> chosenValue]

  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accept(p, b, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = 0
  /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v
  /\ acceptors' = [i \in 1..N |-> acceptors[i] \cup [chosenBallot -> b, chosenValue -> v]]
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = chosen

Accepted(p, b, v) == 
  /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
  /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v
  /\ acceptors' = acceptors
  /\ proposers' = proposers
  /\ chosen' = Append(chosen, <<b, v>>)

Next == 
  /\ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = 0
        /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = 0
        /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = NULL
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ proposers' = proposers
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        /\ Prepare(p, b)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = 0
        /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = NULL
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ proposers' = proposers
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        /\ Promise(p, b)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = 0
        /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ proposers' = proposers
        /\ chosen' = chosen
        /\ Accept(p, b, v)
  \/ \E p \in 1..M : \E b \in 1..N : \E v \in V : 
        /\ proposers[p].maxBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosenBallot = b
        /\ proposers[p].chosenValue = v
        /\ acceptors' = acceptors
        /\ proposers' = proposers
        /\ chosen' = Append(chosen, <<b, v>>)
        /\ Accepted(p, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> [maxBallot -> Nat, promisedBallot -> Nat, chosenBallot -> Nat, chosenValue -> [V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [maxBallot -> Nat, chosenBallot -> Nat, chosenValue -> [V \cup {NULL}]]
  /\ chosen \in Seq([b -> Nat)

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Sender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHUNK_COUNT
VARIABLES acked, channel, lost, nextChunk, retransmits, sent

        /\ acked = {}
        /\ retransmits = [c \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT |-> 0]
        /\ nextChunk = 1
        /\ channel = {}
        /\ lost = {}

SendChunk == /\ nextChunk <= CHUNK_COUNT
             /\ channel' = channel \cup {nextChunk}
             /\ sent' = sent \cup {nextChunk}
             /\ nextChunk' = nextChunk + 1
             /\ retransmits' = retransmits
             /\ lost' = lost

AckChunk == /\ nextChunk > CHUNK_COUNT
             /\ \E c \in channel : c \in acked'
             /\ channel' = channel \ {c}
             /\ retransmits' = retransmits
             /\ lost' = lost

RetransmitChunk == /\ nextChunk > CHUNK_COUNT
                  /\ \E c \in channel : c \notin acked'
                  /\ channel' = channel \ {c}
                  /\ retransmits' = [retransmits EXCEPT ![c] = @ + 1]
                  /\ lost' = lost

LoseChunk == /\ nextChunk > CHUNK_COUNT
             /\ \E c \in channel : c \notin acked'
             /\ channel' = channel \ {c}
             /\ retransmits' = retransmits
             /\ lost' = lost \cup {c}

Next == \/ SendChunk
        \/ AckChunk
        \/ RetransmitChunk
        \/ LoseChunk

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, acked, retransmits, nextChunk, channel, lost>>

TypeOK == /\ sent \subseteq 1..CHUNK_COUNT
          /\ acked \subseteq 1..CHUNK_COUNT
          /\ retransmits \in [1..CHUNK_COUNT -> Nat]
          /\ nextChunk \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT + 1
          /\ channel \subseteq 1..CHUNK_COUNT
          /\ lost \subseteq 1..CHUNK_COUNT

====
